caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "I NEVER DO SHIT" printed in white across the chest sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. The background features a wall decorated with several framed photographs, a white mannequin torso wearing a garment with a graphic design, and a clothing rack filled with apparel. Two logos are visible on the screen: one on the left side containing "T-SIDE" and one on the right side stating "DON'T TELL NOBODY". Throughout the sequence, the man maintains his position while speaking, his facial expression shifting as he talks and his head tilting slightly. The surrounding environment, including the equipment and background objects, remains static across the frames.
